title: helipterum chlorocephalum
intro: Helipterum chlorocephalum, also known as Swan River daisy, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and hairy leaves. The medicinal properties of Helipterum chlorocephalum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve skin health, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helipterum chlorocephalum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications.
